description: Goal: ordinary source publication, item-macro-expanded source publication, and Fz.Compiler.define publication all become the same semantic operation with one implementation. Signal: source_publish no longer carries a second per-form dispatcher for compiler services; publication of a source fragment is parameterized by scope/env/owner context instead of by call path; identical expanded definitions publish identical facts regardless of whether they came from direct source or a compiler service. Strategy: introduce one publication request/transaction shape, route CompilerService::Define through it, delete the duplicated per-form publication match, and add focused regressions proving fact equivalence across entry paths.
title: Compiler2 source publication: collapse compiler-service and ordinary forms onto one transaction
